t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.Regulation)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. DWH note: ISNULL wraps NULL to 'Unknown'. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Regulation)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Tier tag format changed from '(Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.Regulation)' to '(Tier 1 — Dictionary.Regulation)'; additive ISNULL note is non-lossy. No semantic loss.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Computed: TDCUR_BUY.Abbreviation + '/' + TDCUR_SEL.Abbreviation. Display name for UI (e.g., EUR/USD, AAPL/USD). (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Trading symbol / ticker for the sell-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "GBX". UNIQUE constraint in production. Passthrough from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation via sell-side join. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Currency)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Trading symbol / ticker for the sell-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "GBX". UNIQUE constraint in production. Passthrough from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation via sell-side join. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Currency)

issues.problem: Known values 1, 4, 5 are in the review-needed sidecar (live-data confirmed) but the element description provides no inline key=value decoding. Analyst cannot resolve MifID values without consulting Dim_MifidCategorization.
Tier tag format changed from upstream's '(Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.Regulation)' to '(Tier 1 — Dictionary.Regulation)'. Semantically equivalent but not character-for-character verbatim.

'Phases: 11/14' does not enumerate which 11 phases completed. Makes it impossible to verify whether P2 (row counts) and P3 (distributions) gates were passed. Data claims (197.6M rows, regulation percentages) appear credible but are unattested.
Correctly tagged Tier 3 with no upstream wiki. Review-needed item to create BI_DB_IndexesMapping_Static wiki is appropriate. Not a wiki error.

The upstream bundle incorrectly declared 'NO UPSTREAM WIKI was resolvable for any source.' Dim_Position.md, Dim_Instrument.md, and Dim_Regulation.md all exist in knowledge/synapse/Wiki/ and were correctly used by the writer. This is a harness defect that could cause a false FAIL on re-runs if the bundle is trusted without verification.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Wiki PASSes at 8.95. No regeneration required. If iterating for polish: (1) Add inline key=value pairs to MifID description once Dim_MifidCategorization wiki is available (known values: 1, 4, 5). (2) Enumerate completed phases in footer to make P2/P3 status unambiguous. (3) Fix upstream bundle assembly — Dim_Position.md, Dim_Instrument.md, Dim_Regulation.md must resolve correctly on future regen passes.

skipped_phases: 3 phases unnamed — footer says 11/14 without listing which
